about.title: About ForeignLang
about.subtitle: We are on a mission to break down language barriers in the professional world using advanced AI technology.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: Founded in 2026, ForeignLang started with a simple observation: Technical skills get you hired, but communication skills get you promoted.
mission.p2: We believe that language shouldn't be a barrier to career growth. By combining generative AI with proven pedagogical methods, we've created a platform that helps non-native speakers write, speak, and present with confidence.
